## Description

Briefly describe the issue or feature being addressed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Prompt
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Solution

Explain your approach and any important design decisions.

## Testing

Describe how you tested the change.

- [ ] Added or updated unit/integration tests
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`pytest`)

## NXS Examples

> **Required for new features only.**

Add one or more self-contained and runnable `.nxs` files under `examples/` that demonstrate the new functionality.

- [ ] Added NXS example(s) in `examples/`

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/kebula-it/nemantix/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) guidelines
- [ ] My branch is rebased on the latest `main`
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and reference the related issue where applicable

(Optional) **Closes:** #ISSUE\_NUMBER

## Release Notes

If this change affects users, add a short note describing the impact for release documentation.
